name: Nooks

auth.notes: Nooks accepts bearer tokens in the Authorization header. API keys are long-lived workspace-scoped tokens; OAuth access tokens are short-lived and scope-limited.

rateLimits: Per-workspace, per-endpoint rate limits. Responses include X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset, and 429 responses include Retry-After.
notes: Official OpenAPI-backed developer docs are available for the Nooks Sequencing API.
No official MCP or CLI surfaced during this audit.
API keys have full read/write access within the owning workspace, so agents should prefer OAuth scopes when available.
